main.description: A saved Fluoddity organism: the full parameter set plus the rule seed needed to reproduce a vector-trail slime configuration. Lives on the author's own PDS; readable publicly, written by the author.

schemaVersion.description: Config schema version, so future engine changes can migrate old saves.

config.description: JSON-serialized parameter snapshot. Stored as a string because the atproto data model disallows floating-point numbers, and the config is nearly all floats. rule_seed plus these parameters deterministically reproduce the organism.

gallery.description: Constant link target (a DID) so the global backlink index (Constellation) can enumerate every organism across users. Always did:web:g.mino.mobi.

parent.description: Optional at-uri of the organism this was branched/forked from, forming a lineage tree.
